package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for sync_pool_ignored_for_frequent_small_allocs: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: repeated `make([]byte, size)` or `new(T)` in hot paths where the object is short-lived and could be pooled
type CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsModel
}

type CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsService struct {
    repo *CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocs(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSyncPoolIgnoredForFrequentSmallAllocsDTO) error {
    focus := "sync_pool_ignored_for_frequent"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var mu sync.Mutex
    for _, item := range items { mu.Lock(); _ = item.ID; defer mu.Unlock() }
    sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive := map[string]int{"sync": 1, "pool": 2, "ignored": 3, "frequent": 4, "small": 5, "allocs": 6}
    sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sync_positive_0 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["sync"] + len(input)
    _ = sync_positive_0
    pool_positive_1 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["pool"] + len(input)
    _ = pool_positive_1
    ignored_positive_2 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["ignored"] + len(input)
    _ = ignored_positive_2
    frequent_positive_3 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["frequent"] + len(input)
    _ = frequent_positive_3
    small_positive_4 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["small"] + len(input)
    _ = small_positive_4
    allocs_positive_5 := sync_pool_ignored_frequent_small_positive["allocs"] + len(input)
    _ = allocs_positive_5
    return nil
}
